entity.name: Siddhartha Rajbongshi
entity.description: ML researcher and open-source builder. Ex-Hugging Face, current Research Fellow at University of Nottingham. Building DePIN infrastructure for driver safety and sovereign space systems.

projects.name: SafeRide
projects.description: Open-source DePIN driver safety network with real-time fatigue/distraction detection via edge AI, IoT telemetry, and tamper-evident incident logging on Solana. Go backend, SvelteKit dashboard, fully open-source under MIT.

plans.name: Pilot deployment funding
plans.description: Fund 1-month pilot with 10 drivers, hardware kits, and on-chain logging validation

plans.name: Developer compensation
plans.description: Monthly maintainer time for SafeRide development and community support

plans.name: Goodwill support
plans.description: Any amount to support open-source DePIN safety infrastructure
